title: crataegus oxyacantha f. rosea
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha f. rosea is a variety of the hawthorn plant, specifically a pink-flowering cultivar of the common hawthorn tree (Crataegus oxyacantha), known for its vibrant pink flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to support heart health due to its antioxidant and flavonoid content, which help to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular function. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha f. rosea include reducing blood pressure, improving circulation, and lowering cholesterol levels, making it a popular herbal remedy for heart-related issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
